wall_fill strokes S1 and S2 are given as full-width rects; the wall body around windows is physically interrupted but windows merely overlay the fill per pen_library §3 (windows here don't fully break the fill)

building outline (silhouette frame) coincides with wall_fill edges — not drawn as a separate outline stroke (pen_library: outline only when it adds z not in wall_fill+levels)
